T0134.title: Mule Training
T0134.definition: The process of identifying and targeting potential victims, referred to as 'horses.' This involves finding susceptible individuals, approaching them through various means, building trust, and ultimately executing the fraud.
T0134.description: The process of identifying and targeting potential victims, referred to as 'horses.' This involves finding susceptible individuals, approaching them through various means, building trust, and ultimately executing the fraud.
T0134.usageExample: 那组专门训马的，先打电话冒充北京专家，再寄假药和伪造的康复案例，把老太太训得服服帖帖，最后连养老钱都掏空了。
